reasoning: The market probability was 0.74 on April 3, indicating a very high likelihood that the website's tally 'Time Spent Golfing' will reach the 25% threshold (25 days out of the first 100). While the lookup tool retrieved bizarre figures (e.g. 445 days in office, which is impossible given his January 2025 inauguration), this is likely due to the tool parsing a placeholder, projection, or historical footnote on the page. Early reports from mid-February showed the percentage at 24% to 29%, consistently hovering around or exceeding the needed threshold. Since the market provides a robust and recent (10 days ago) estimate based squarely on the site's tally, and historical base rates for his first term also support a high golfing frequency, I am forecasting 73%.
